capability_evaluations.title: Repository indexing pipeline
capability_evaluations.description: Repository intake, traversal, metadata extraction, and index write flow.
capability_evaluations.why_useful_here: This project must ingest many repositories reliably, with evidence and metadata quality controls. Better indexing design directly improves retrieval trust.
repo_types_sought: Code search engines and source indexers
Data systems with explicit ingest and index-write paths
query_hints: repository indexing pipeline clone ingest metadata
capability_evaluations.recommendation_rationale: Recommend adopt because we have enough high-confidence matches (high=4, medium=0) and the signal is not too broad (high_ratio=0.25).

options_considered.label: Adopt now
pros: Fastest path to shipping measurable value
Keeps momentum when evidence is already strong
cons: Risk of overfitting if signal breadth is low
May pull in patterns that are not specific to our domain
options_considered.best_when: The capability has specific, high-quality matches and clear fit for `repo_indexing_pipeline`

options_considered.label: Adapt first
pros: Balances speed and safety by tailoring to project constraints
Reduces false positives before capability promotion
cons: Adds design and implementation time
Needs another evaluation loop before final acceptance
options_considered.best_when: Signal is promising but too broad, noisy, or only partially specific

options_considered.label: Reject for now
pros: Avoids introducing low-confidence behavior
Protects trust while discovery criteria are refined
cons: Delays potential capability gains
Requires a new repo cohort or sharper detection patterns
options_considered.best_when: Required signals do not pass consistently or evidence is mostly generic

capability_evaluations.title: Semantic retrieval stack
capability_evaluations.description: Embedding generation, vector similarity search, and retrieval ranking logic.
capability_evaluations.why_useful_here: Capability search quality depends on semantic retrieval and ranking. This capability strengthens query understanding beyond lexical keyword overlap.
repo_types_sought: Vector databases and semantic search systems
Hybrid ranker and retrieval framework repos
query_hints: semantic retrieval embeddings vector search hybrid rank
cosine similarity ann nearest neighbors ranking

capability_evaluations.title: Evaluation harness
capability_evaluations.description: Benchmark datasets, quality metrics, and report comparison workflows.
capability_evaluations.why_useful_here: Dogfooding requires proving quality changes with objective metrics, not intuition. A strong evaluation harness lets us iterate quickly without silent regressions.
repo_types_sought: Mature repos with benchmark and regression workflows
Projects with quality dashboards and metrics reports
Libraries that compare baseline and candidate performance
query_hints: benchmark evaluation harness precision recall report
